title: A Single Night
content:
Was one night,
    And that a night
    Without much sleep,
    Enough to make me love
    All the life long?

    From the Japanese of the wife of the Mikado Sui-toka In (twelfth century).
meaning:
Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Single Night"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
